definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Choose whichever one you like.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Used to refer to any one from a limited set.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Take whatever you need.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to refer to any thing or amount, no matter what.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to refer to any thing or amount, no matter what.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have no money whatever.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used after 'no' or 'none' for emphasis (meaning 'at all').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used after 'no' or 'none' for emphasis (meaning 'at all').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Whosoever finds this is lucky.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A formal or archaic word for 'whoever'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A formal or archaic word for 'whoever'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Please read the following text.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce a list, example, or statement.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce a list, example, or statement.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: They went to their respective homes.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: They went to their respective homes.
definitions.usage_context_en: Belonging or relating separately to each of two or more people or things.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Belonging or relating separately to each of two or more people or things.]
